name: See's Fudge Candy (the "Original" Recipe!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar with one can of evaporated milk in a large bowl.
2. Heat over medium until it reaches a rolling boil, stirring frequently.
3. Once boiling, mix together 3 packages of chocolate chips, 7 ounces of marshmallow cream, and half a pound of melted margarine.
4. Combine the margarine and marshmallow cream thoroughly.
5. Add the chocolate chips to the mixture and stir well.
6. Pour the hot fudge over the chocolate mixture in buttered pans.
7. Let cool until the chocolate has melted completely.
8. Stir in 2 cups of nuts and 1 teaspoon of vanilla, then pour into buttered pans.
9. Chill in the refrigerator until firm.
10. Cut into squares before serving.
This recipe makes about 5 lbs of fudge. Each piece is estimated to contain around 47 gazillion calories. Dieters, beware!
